subject: New Request: Backend Developer – PHP
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from Shopgrid, a company in the e-commerce space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Backend Developer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:
• PHP
• AWS
• Kubernetes
• MySQL
• Kafka

Practical details:
• Start: ASAP
• Duration: 6 months
• Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
• Rate: up to 925 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
Therese Magnusson
Staffing Coordinator
Staffbridge Nordic
Tel: +46 76 344 56 78
